mapper.select: select d.dict_label from cv_video_tags as t inner join sys_dict_data as d on t.tag = d.dict_value where t.vid = #{value}
mapper.sql: SELECT f.id, f.name, f.state, f.leader, f.actor, f.part, f.ins, f.public_date,f.img_url, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cv_video_like WHERE vid = f.id) AS likes, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cv_video_subscribe WHERE vid = f.id) AS subscribe, (SELECT week FROM cv_week_table WHERE vid = f.id) AS week FROM cv_video_info f
mapper.select: WHERE (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyWord}, '%') OR leader LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyWord}, '%') OR actor LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyWord}, '%'))
WHERE public_date BETWEEN (SELECT public_date FROM film_data WHERE id = #{id}) AND DATE_ADD((SELECT public_date FROM film_data WHERE id = #{id}), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) LIMIT 15
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cv_video_like WHERE uid = #{uid} AND vid = #{vid}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(f.id, s.vid) AS id, f.name, f.state, f.leader, f.actor, f.part, f.ins, f.public_date,f.img_url FROM cv_video_subscribe AS s LEFT JOIN cv_video_info AS f ON f.id = s.vid WHERE s.uid = #{uid} AND f.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyWord}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cv_video_subscribe WHERE uid = #{uid} AND vid = #{vid}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cv_video_like WHERE uid = #{uid} AND vid = #{vid}
SELECT id, play_count as playCount FROM cv_video_info
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cv_video_subscribe WHERE uid = #{uid} AND vid = #{vid}
